{{Quote|I'm looking for Ulic…or maybe just a warm cup of stim-tea…|Vima Sunrider|<ref name="TOTJR3">[[Tales of the Jedi – Redemption 3|''Tales of the Jedi – Redemption'' 3]]</ref>}}
'''Stim tea''' was a type of [[Tea/Legends|tea]] that came in a variety of flavors, and could be served both hot and col.

==Description==
Stim tea was a type of [[Tea/Legends|tea]] that came in a variety of flavors, including [[scry-mint]] and [[Roonan lemon]]. It could be served with flavorings such as [[Zingbee honey]] and [[Christophsian sugar/Legends|Christophsian sugar]].<ref name="Dex">{{Hyperspace|url=fans/hyperspace/source/dexdiner/index.html|text=Dining at Dex's|int=Dining at Dex's}}</ref> Stim tea could be served cool and in a glass,<ref name="Darksaber">''[[Darksaber (novel)|Darksaber]]''</ref> or served hot in cups.<ref name="Rebel">''[[Rebel Dawn]]''</ref>

==History==
[[Dex's Diner/Legends|Dex's Diner]] sold a number of stim tea flavors from across [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. The tea cost one and a half [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]], and [[Dexter Jettster/Legends|Dex]] offered complimentary refills on all beverages.<ref name="Dex" />

During her time as a member of the [[Cult of The One and The All]], [[Bria Tharen]] would drink stim tea daily with [[Han Solo/Legends|Vykk]] and [[Muuurgh]].<ref name="Paradise">''[[The Paradise Snare]]''</ref> [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Natasi Daala]] drank cool stim tea,<ref name="Darksaber" /> while [[Administrator/Legends|Administrator]] [[Hekis Durumm Perdo Kolokk Baldikarr Thun]] had a daily cup of stim-tea served by his [[Administrative droid/Legends|administrative droid]] [[3D-4X]].<ref name="EGTD">''[[The Essential Guide to Droids]]''</ref>
